action.reasoning: Observation: the attempted longer DDP training failed before training due to torch distributed rendezvous timeout, so no new checkpoint was produced. The workspace now has a patched predict.py using short_side=768 and horizontal flip TTA, but this change has not been evaluated. Analysis: before spending more time on training, evaluate the current best 8-epoch checkpoint with the improved inference pipeline; this may improve mIoU immediately and also measures evaluation cost with TTA. Decision: submit the existing best checkpoint for evaluation using the current predict.py.
